summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P-Nice collagen e-commerce website. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend loads correctly with responsive design. All major features working as expected.

design_issues.issue: Placeholder images instead of actual product photos

passed_tests: All 12 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Homepage loads with all 8 sections (hero, trust bar, rituals, best sellers, bundles, reviews, FAQ, newsletter)
Mobile responsive design (390x844 viewport) working correctly
Navigation structure present with SHOP, WHY COLLAGEN, FAQ, OUR STORY
Cart creation and item management APIs functional
Cart totals calculation accurate with free shipping threshold
action_item_for_main_agent: Replace placeholder images with actual product images for better visual appeal. All core functionality is working correctly.
